overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along wet streets and sidewalks beneath overpasses, past digital billboards, through green neon archways, and by a colorful LED-lit bus station.

events.description: crossing wet asphalt street with yellow markings while vehicles pass in distance

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the concrete overpass and crossing the street toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance
car driving on the wet street under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with yellow safety barriers and structural beams
large pink neon sign reading WET DREAM on dark building facade
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens beneath a massive concrete highway overpass at night. The camera moves forward across a wet asphalt street marked with yellow lines, heading toward a sidewalk. A prominent pink neon sign reading WET DREAM glows on a building to the left, while skyscrapers with illuminated windows rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital advertising and palm trees

events.description: moving from street crossing onto commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Wet Dream building and palm tree landscaping

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with spotlights illuminating their trunks
checkered yellow and blue construction barriers along the sidewalk edge
elevated roadway structure with green lighting visible underneath

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the sidewalk, the camera passes the Wet Dream building now visible as a full facade on the left. Tall palm trees with uplighting line the path, while yellow and blue checkered barricades sit on the right. The elevated highway runs parallel on the left side as digital billboards glow in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with green neon archway tunnel

events.description: entering covered walkway corridor framed by green neon archways
passing through the series of green neon arches while approaching a pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor of green neon arches toward an oncoming character

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket and backpack walking toward camera through the archway

entered.detail: series of rectangular metal archways with bright green neon tube lighting along edges

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a covered pedestrian corridor defined by striking green neon archways that create a tunnel effect. The pavement changes to tiles, and palm trees now line the left side. A character in a yellow jacket approaches from the opposite direction as the camera moves through the glowing green structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station plaza with color-changing LED facade

events.description: exiting archway and crossing street toward transit station with colorful LED lighting
LED station lights shift colors from pink to blue to green as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the transit station plaza with changing colored lights

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench near illuminated palm tree
person walking across the plaza toward the station

entered.detail: long transit station structure with horizontal LED strips cycling through pink blue and green colors
simple concrete seating blocks along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the green archway corridor, the scene opens into a wide plaza facing a transit station. The station facade features long horizontal LED strips that cycle through vibrant pink, blue, and green colors. The camera crosses the street and walks along the plaza, passing concrete benches where a person sits beneath an illuminated palm tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with curved digital displays

events.description: turning back toward commercial corridor with large curved digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet pavement toward the commercial buildings with large glowing advertisements

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying colorful advertisements on building facade
tall building with multiple levels of neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back toward a commercial corridor lined with massive curved digital billboards displaying vibrant advertisements. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from the buildings. Palm trees continue to line the left side of the walkway as the scene progresses deeper into the neon-lit commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadow of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins by moving across a wet asphalt street beneath a massive highway, passing a glowing pink Wet Dream sign as skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera transitions onto the sidewalk, it glides past uplit palm trees and checkered barricades before entering a covered pedestrian corridor defined by a series of striking green neon archways. The scene then opens into a wide plaza facing a transit station with cycling LED strips, where the camera crosses the street past concrete benches and illuminated greenery. Finally, the view turns toward a commercial corridor lined with massive curved digital billboards, with the wet pavement reflecting the intense colors of the surrounding advertisements.
